name: Unlur
author: Jorge Gómez Arrausi (2001) / AGP port
description: Jorge Gómez Arrausi's asymmetric connection game on a hexagonal board of hexagons. A 'contract' opening fixes who plays Black and who plays White: both players place BLACK stones (off the border) until one passes — the passer becomes Black, the other becomes White. Black then wins by connecting three non-adjacent sides (a Y); White wins by connecting two opposite sides (a line). Complete your opponent's goal instead of your own and you LOSE. Draws are impossible.
